description:
Add Polish Translations for Contact Page

Complete the Polish language translation for the contact page (/pl/contact/) which currently contains untranslated content.

Requirements:
- Identify all untranslated text strings on the /pl/contact/ page
- Translate remaining English text to Polish
- Ensure translations match the tone and style of existing Polish content
- Verify all UI elements are translated (labels, buttons, placeholders, error messages, validation text)
- Check for hardcoded strings that should be extracted to translation files
- Test form functionality with Polish translations
- Ensure proper Polish character encoding and special characters display correctly
- Verify translations are contextually appropriate for Polish users

Edge cases to consider:
- Dynamic content or JavaScript-generated text
- Meta tags and SEO-related content
- Error states and validation messages
- Tooltips and aria-labels for accessibility
